overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic-style wizard dormitory with stone vaulted ceilings, four-poster beds with emerald green curtains, and ornate wooden furniture. The player character walks through the room, exits into a narrow stone corridor with an intricate stained glass ceiling, and returns to explore the atmospheric interior further.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory with canopy beds and stone vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: slowly walking around the dormitory perimeter, observing the four-poster beds with green curtains and the ornate stone architecture

entered.detail: dark wood canopy bed with emerald green velvet curtains and white bedding
high gothic stone arches with ribbed vaulting and greenish ambient lighting
large ornate circular window in ceiling with intricate metal tracery
dark wood tall dresser with multiple drawers
gothic stone arch with carved details leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a spacious gothic dormitory with a high vaulted stone ceiling and a large circular stained glass skylight. The camera moves slowly past four-poster beds draped in rich green velvet, revealing wooden furniture and stone archways in the atmospheric green-lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition between dormitory and stone corridor

events.description: exits the dormitory room through a heavy wooden door into a narrow stone corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the heavy wooden door, grasping the ornate metal handle, and stepping out into the corridor

entered.detail: dark oak door with intricate metal scrollwork and glass panels showing tree motifs
rough-hewn stone brick wall with patches of moss
ornate wall-mounted lantern with warm yellow light
long arched stained glass ceiling with green and blue panes in geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the exit of the dormitory, passing through a heavy wooden door with ornate metalwork into a narrow stone corridor. The lighting shifts from the ambient green of the room to the warmer glow of wall lanterns as the stained glass ceiling of the corridor becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone walkway with stained glass ceiling

events.description: turns to look back at the dormitory door while continuing down the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow stone corridor, observing the intricate stained glass ceiling and moss-covered walls

entered.detail: ornate dark metal railing with decorative scroll patterns along the corridor edge
small circular stained glass skylight set into the stone ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down the narrow stone corridor, passing under the luminous green stained glass ceiling that casts colored light onto the patterned floor. The walls show signs of age with moss growth, and ornate metal railings line the walkway as the camera moves deeper into the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory interior with central seating area

events.description: re-enters the dormitory room through the heavy wooden door
turns to face the center of the room, focusing on the decorative birdcage structure

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the dormitory, examining the furniture and beds from different angles before approaching the center

entered.detail: tall dark wood wardrobe with carved details
large ornate wooden birdcage structure on a stone base in the center of the room
circular patterned rug with green and gold designs on the stone floor
gothic stone fireplace with warm firelight glowing
wooden writing desk with chair and various objects

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dormitory, the camera re-enters the spacious room and begins a thorough exploration of the interior. The player moves past wooden wardrobes and desks, circling the central decorative birdcage structure while the warm glow of the fireplace and wall sconces illuminates the stone architecture.

events.description: exits the dormitory back into the stone corridor

agents.ego_description: moving toward the exit and stepping out of the dormitory into the corridor

entered.detail: green and blue stained glass panels set in the arched stone ceiling
aged stone brick wall with moss and vines

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera exiting the dormitory once more, leaving the green-lit interior behind to enter the narrow stone corridor. The stained glass ceiling glows overhead as the camera moves away from the room, concluding the exploration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the lush, green-lit interior of a gothic dormitory into a narrow, luminous stone corridor and back again. It begins by gliding past four-poster beds draped in green velvet under a high vaulted ceiling, moving toward a heavy ornate door that opens into a corridor where the ambient green light shifts to the warm glow of wall lanterns. As the camera proceeds deeper into the passage, it passes under a glowing stained glass ceiling that casts colored light onto mossy stone walls and patterned floors. The scene then shifts as the camera re-enters the dormitory to circle a central decorative birdcage and explore wooden wardrobes illuminated by the flicker of a fireplace. Finally, the camera exits the room once more, leaving the warm interior behind to move back into the narrow corridor beneath the glowing overhead glass.
